6:
WITH total_cons AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID,
           c.Segment,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_total AS (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM total_cons
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM total_cons
    WHERE total_consumption = (SELECT min_consumption FROM min_total)
),
avg_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM filtered
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment,
       pct_growth
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           ( (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
              SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0)
           ) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) AS growth
WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MAX(pct_growth) FROM growth)
   OR pct_growth = (SELECT MIN(pct_growth) FROM growth);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

                        instr(substr(res.time, instr(res.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 +

SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT max_income - min_income FROM stats) AS income_diff
FROM (
    WITH female_clients AS (
        SELECT c.client_id,
               julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date) AS age_days
        FROM client c
        WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    ),
    client_income AS (
        SELECT fc.client_id,
               AVG(l.amount) AS avg_income,
               fc.age_days
        FROM female_clients fc
        LEFT JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = fc.client_id
        LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = d.account_id
        GROUP BY fc.client_id
    ),
    stats AS (
        SELECT MIN(avg_income) AS min_income,
               MAX(avg_income) AS max_income
        FROM client_income
    ),
    filtered AS (
        SELECT ci.client_id,
               ci.avg_income,
               ci.age_days
        FROM client_income ci, stats s
        WHERE ci.avg_income = s.min_income
    ),
    oldest AS (
        SELECT MAX(age_days) AS max_age FROM filtered
    ),
    target_clients AS (
        SELECT f.client_id
        FROM filtered f, oldest o
        WHERE f.age_days = o.max_age
    ),
    accounts AS (
        SELECT d.account_id
        FROM target_clients tc
        JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = tc.client_id
    )
    SELECT account_id FROM accounts
) a;	----- bird -----	financial
